John Palmer, Esq. 949-922-7883 john@johnpalmerlegal.com for Plaintiff.
Frances Bruce, Esq. 415-851-5900 fbruce@maddenlynch.com Law Offices of Madden & Lynch for Defendant SHAHIN JAVAHERI.

10:21 a.m. The matter is recalled.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT SHAHIN JAVAHERI's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Granted.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
